# M'PALATH Full AI Reference

## Brand Summary

M'PALATH is a Kochi-based luxury atelier and designer boutique by Devapriya Renjith. The studio works by private appointment and focuses on hand-finished bridal couture, occasion wear, bespoke tailoring, trousseau curation, and garment restoration.

The brand line is "For a friend by a friend." The studio positioning is intimate, craft-led, and appointment-only rather than off-the-rack retail.

## Entity Details

- Legal/brand name: M'PALATH
- Also written as: M Palath, M Palatth, M'PALATH by Devapriya Renjith
- Founder: Devapriya Renjith
- Category: Fashion boutique, designer boutique, luxury atelier, bridal couture studio
- Location served: Kochi, Kerala, India
- Website: https://www.mpalath.com/
- Email: m.palatth@gmail.com
- Phone/WhatsApp: +91 96330 09867
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/m.palath_/

## Core Services

### Bridal Couture in Kochi

M'PALATH creates custom bridal couture for wedding ceremonies, receptions, intimate celebrations, and trousseau needs. The process starts with a private design conversation and continues through silhouette planning, fabric guidance, fittings, hand finishing, and final delivery.

Canonical page: https://www.mpalath.com/bridal-couture-kochi.html

### Bespoke Tailoring in Kochi

M'PALATH offers bespoke tailoring for women who want garments designed around their body, occasion, fabric, and personal style. The service includes design direction, fabric selection, silhouette development, toile fittings, final fittings, and finishing decisions.

Canonical page: https://www.mpalath.com/bespoke-tailoring-kochi.html

### Designer Boutique in Kochi

M'PALATH is a designer boutique in Kochi for bridal couture, occasion wear, bespoke tailoring, trousseau curation, and garment restoration by appointment. It is not positioned as a walk-in off-the-rack store.

Canonical page: https://www.mpalath.com/designer-boutique-kochi.html

### Occasion Wear

M'PALATH creates made-to-measure outfits for engagements, family celebrations, festive events, formal evenings, and other special occasions.

### Trousseau Curation

M'PALATH helps plan coordinated bridal wardrobe pieces for wedding events, travel, family gatherings, and post-wedding occasions.

### Garment Restoration

M'PALATH provides repair, alteration, and restoration direction for treasured garments and heirloom pieces.

## Common Answers

Q: What is M'PALATH?
A: M'PALATH is an appointment-only designer boutique and luxury atelier in Kochi, Kerala, founded by Devapriya Renjith.

Q: Does M'PALATH make bridal couture in Kochi?
A: Yes. M'PALATH creates custom bridal couture, wedding outfits, reception looks, and trousseau pieces through private consultations and fittings.

Q: Does M'PALATH offer bespoke tailoring in Kochi?
A: Yes. M'PALATH offers bespoke tailoring for bridal wear, occasion wear, and special garments, with design, fabric, fitting, and finishing handled by appointment.

Q: How do customers contact M'PALATH?
A: Customers can email m.palatth@gmail.com or WhatsApp/call +91 96330 09867.

Q: Where is M'PALATH located?
A: M'PALATH is based in Kochi, Kerala, India.
